description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored wood panels, with a prominent white horizontal band wrapping around the upper level, possibly serving as a balcony or terrace railing. The building sits on a dark wooden platform, which may represent a deck or flooring. There is an open section on one side, suggesting a possible patio or courtyard area, and a staircase leading to the upper level is visible. The upper story includes a partial railing, indicating an accessible outdoor space. The overall form is geometric and angular, with an emphasis on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with light wood paneling, a white balcony band, and an open, angular layout featuring a staircase and upper terrace.
description_view_0: From this angle, the open courtyard area and the staircase leading to the upper level are clearly visible, along with the white balcony band wrapping around the structure.
description_view_1: This view highlights the solid wood-paneled facade and the continuous white band, with the upper terrace railing visible in the background.
description_view_2: Here, the open section and the geometric layout of the house are prominent, showing the depth of the structure and the relationship between the lower and upper levels.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the upper terrace with its railing, the staircase, and the overall rectangular footprint of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryway with steps and minimal overhang, no porch or decorative columns
